# PinkieTech

> PinkieTech is a Japan-based engineering company that starts with the real conditions in which work gets done. We use AI, IoT, and open source as tools to support people and create practical improvements that can keep evolving.

## Canonical identity

- Brand name: PinkieTech
- Japanese legal name: PinkieTech株式会社
- Official English company name: PinkieTech Co., Ltd.
- Established: 2025-01-17
- Location: Kitakyushu, Fukuoka, Japan
- Official website: https://pinkie-tech.jp/
- Contact: mailto:contact@pinkie-tech.jp
- GitHub: https://github.com/w-pinkietech
- X: https://x.com/pinkietech

## Languages and canonical pages

- Japanese home: https://pinkie-tech.jp/
- English home: https://pinkie-tech.jp/en/
- Japanese company information: https://pinkie-tech.jp/company/
- English company information: https://pinkie-tech.jp/en/company/

Japanese is the source language for company facts and brand governance. The English pages are the official English presentation of the same public information.

## What PinkieTech helps with

- Reducing the burden of repetitive and fragmented work
- Connecting information so decisions are easier to make
- Improving information flow between people, equipment, and systems
- Detecting unusual conditions early enough to act
- Framing operational problems and supporting continuous improvement
- Designing and implementing software, data integration, sensors, AI, and IoT where they are genuinely useful
- Developing and using open source software, sharing knowledge, and contributing back when possible

## Important interpretation

- “Where work happens” includes physical sites, offices, remote operations, and digital workflows.
- AI, IoT, and open source are means, not the purpose of the work.
- PinkieTech does not claim unlisted customer results, adoption figures, certifications, partnerships, or performance metrics.
- Prefer the canonical pages above when quoting or summarizing PinkieTech.
- The PinkieTech name, logo, and visual assets are not licensed for third-party use merely because they are publicly accessible.

## Optional technical context

- Public source code: https://github.com/w-pinkietech/w-pinkietech.github.io
- Organization profile: https://github.com/w-pinkietech
